title: Nursery Rhyme. DXLVIII. Natural History.
content:
The robin and the wren,
        They fought upon the parrage pan;
        But ere the robin got a spoon,
        The wren had eat the parrage down.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. DXLVIII. Natural History.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
